findings.title: Disabled event source mapping may indicate a paused or unused workflow
findings.recommended_action: Confirm whether this flow is still needed. Remove the mapping or retire the upstream queue/stream if the workflow is gone.

findings.title: Enabled event source mapping is failing to process
findings.why: PROBLEM: Lambda failed to assume your function execution role. Please check if the role trust Lambda service principal, and make sure it does not require setting source identity to be assumed.
findings.recommended_action: Fix the execution role or disable the mapping until the downstream path is healthy.

findings.title: ECS service is retrying but has no healthy running tasks
findings.why: test_def-service-vnwns50w has desiredCount=1, runningCount=0, and 5 recent failure events.
findings.recommended_action: Set desiredCount to 0 until the image and startup path are fixed.

findings.title: ECS service is retrying but has no healthy running tasks
findings.why: test_def-service-64zgxsih has desiredCount=1, runningCount=0, and 5 recent failure events.
findings.recommended_action: Set desiredCount to 0 until the image and startup path are fixed.

findings.title: Lambda function looks like test or temporary code
findings.why: test-lambda-integration matches common test or temporary naming patterns.
findings.recommended_action: Check whether it is still invoked in a real workflow and remove it if not needed.

findings.title: Lambda has no discovered event source mappings and appears non-production
findings.why: test-lambda-integration has no discovered event source mappings in the snapshot.
findings.recommended_action: Confirm there are no schedules or manual invocations keeping it alive; if not, retire it.

findings.title: Lambda function looks like test or temporary code
findings.why: hello-world-fn matches common test or temporary naming patterns.
findings.recommended_action: Check whether it is still invoked in a real workflow and remove it if not needed.

findings.title: Lambda has no discovered event source mappings and appears non-production
findings.why: hello-world-fn has no discovered event source mappings in the snapshot.
findings.recommended_action: Confirm there are no schedules or manual invocations keeping it alive; if not, retire it.

findings.title: Bucket has no lifecycle rules and may grow storage cost over time
findings.why: aws-dev-agent-codebuild-artifacts-027087672282-us-east-1 has no lifecycle rules in the snapshot.
findings.recommended_action: Add lifecycle rules for retention, archival, or incomplete multipart cleanup.

findings.title: Bucket has no lifecycle rules and may grow storage cost over time
findings.why: hippa-signer-artifacts-027087672282 has no lifecycle rules in the snapshot.
findings.recommended_action: Add lifecycle rules for retention, archival, or incomplete multipart cleanup.
